Episodes.Title: Fight to the Death
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Alix MacDonald
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Mark Whelan, Alex Furber
Episodes.Plot: British Airways flight 548 crashes shortly after take off from London Heathrow airport in 1972. Piecing the clues together one by one, the investigation reveals shocking truth.

Episodes.Title: Speed Trap
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Gary Lang
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Doug MacLeod, Rick Hughes
Episodes.Plot: An unfortunate mid-air collision in 1971 brings sweeping changes to the ATC system in the USA.

Episodes.Title: Lost in Translation
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Brian D. Young
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Barna Moricz, Mark Winnick
Episodes.Plot: Crossair flight 498 crashes shortly after take-off from Zurich. The airplane was in good condition and the pilots had adequate training. Or did they? The investigation takes a dramatic turn when the cockpit voice recorder is retri...

Episodes.Title: Disaster on the Potomac
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Michael Sheehan
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Darryl Flatman, Brandon Thomas
Episodes.Plot: After Air Florida flight 90 crashes on take-off from Washington D.C., it is not easy to find the cause of the accident. It turns out eventually that this was no accident but simple and deadly oversight.

Episodes.Title: Queens Catastrophe
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Armen Kazazian
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Michael Kash, Bruce Godfree
Episodes.Plot: A plane crash (American Airlines flight 587) in New York just two months after 9/11.

Episodes.Title: Into the Eye of the Storm
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Phil Desjardins
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Nick Baillie
Episodes.Plot: Hugo, a category 5 hurricane, threatens to rip a plane apart.

Episodes.Title: Massacre Over the Mediterranean
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, John LaRose
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Stephen Bogaert, Vincent Bellon
Episodes.Plot: When Itavia flight 870 goes missing over the Mediterranean sea, a conspiracy theory of a missile strike surfaces. Was the plane shot down by a Libyan fighter jet?

Episodes.Title: Deadly Test
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Carl Knutson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, David Storch, Daniel Matmor
Episodes.Plot: During an in-flight test for XL Airways Germany Airbus A320, the aircraft suddenly pitches up, loses lift, then crashes into the sea.

Episodes.Title: Terror in Paradise
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Mike Sheehan
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Daniel Kash, Stuart Clow
Episodes.Plot: A popular Twin Otter aircraft crashes shortly after take-off in Tahiti. A bad maintenance decision and a series of other factors combined together create just the right recipe for disaster.

Episodes.Title: Titanic in the Sky
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, John LaRose
Episodes.Actors: Stephen Bogaert, Greg Ellwand, Alec McClure
Episodes.Plot: An emergency landing is forced by pilots after an engine explodes. [ Airbus A380 Airliner ]

Episodes.Title: Getting Out Alive
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Doug Crosbie
Episodes.Actors: Stephen Bogaert, Andrew Gillies, John Fitzgerald Jay
Episodes.Plot: A special showing how people survived certain air crashes and how airline crews are trained to facilitate survival of the passengers.
